key_principles: Motion is Meaning: Every animation must guide the user or tell a story.
Depth over Flatness: Use z-index, shadows, and blurs to create immersive depth.
Content is King: Typography and spacing drive the narrative.
No Boring Grids: Use asymmetry and variation.

palettes.aurora: Gradients of Violet (#8b5cf6), Cyan (#06b6d4), and Emerald (#10b981)

layout_strategy.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-8 to p-24 for sections. Gap-8+ for grids.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: bg-white/10 dark:bg-slate-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 shadow-xl

gradients.aurora_light: bg-gradient-to-tr from-violet-200 via-cyan-200 to-emerald-200 opacity-60 blur-3xl
gradients.aurora_dark: bg-gradient-to-tr from-violet-900 via-cyan-900 to-slate-900 opacity-40 blur-3xl

backgrounds.starfield: Canvas-based or DIV particle system moving in Z-space towards camera. White dots on dark bg.
backgrounds.aurora: Moving huge blur blobs (divs with blur-3xl) interacting with each other.
backgrounds.hexagon_grid: SVG Hexagon pattern where opacity/scale of individual hexes cycles randomly.
backgrounds.waves: SVG paths animating with 'd' attribute interpolation or simpler CSS translation.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-cyan-500/25 transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: Glassmorphism base. Hover lifts up. Border glows on hover.
cards.classes: rounded-xl border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm transition-all hover:shadow-md hover:-translate-y-1

inputs.style: Minimalist, no heavy borders. Focus ring is Accent color.

images.description: Abstract neon lines form a digital landscape
Abstract geometric lines with neon green and purple glow

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use 'transition: all'. Use specific properties.
Ensure dark/light mode toggle persists in localStorage.
No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Images must have alt text for accessibility.
Use semantic HTML (main, section, article, nav).
Manrope for Headings, Inter for Body.
